title: Python Decorators
summary: Python decorators wrap a function to add or modify its behavior without changing the original function.
common_mistakes: Forgetting to return the wrapper function
Calling the decorated function instead of returning it
practice_idea: Create a decorator that logs function calls.

title: Python Async Programming
summary: Asynchronous programming allows Python programs to perform other work while waiting for operations to finish.
common_mistakes: Forgetting to use await with a coroutine
Using blocking functions inside asynchronous code
practice_idea: Create two asynchronous functions that run concurrently with asyncio.gather.

title: Python List Comprehensions
summary: List comprehensions provide a concise way to create lists from iterable objects.
common_mistakes: Placing the condition in the wrong position
Creating comprehensions that are too difficult to read
practice_idea: Create a list containing the squares of all even numbers between 1 and 20.

title: Python Object-Oriented Programming
summary: Object-oriented programming organizes code using classes and objects that contain data and behavior.
common_mistakes: Forgetting the self parameter in instance methods
Confusing class attributes with instance attributes
practice_idea: Create a Student class with name and grade attributes and a method that displays the student's information.

title: REST APIs
summary: REST APIs allow applications to communicate over HTTP by exchanging structured data.
practice_idea: Create a small API endpoint that returns a list of programming topics in JSON format.
